headline: Preventive detention laws total 7 across Malaysian statutes
context: Malaysia maintains 7 separate laws allowing preventive detention without trial, more than any other ASEAN nation as of 2025.

cards.big: 7 separate Malaysian laws allow detention without trial as of 2025
cards.sub: SOSMA, POCA, DDA, POTA, NSC Act, Immigration Act, and EO all permit preventive detention

cards.big: Article 149 of Federal Constitution specifically enables preventive detention laws
cards.sub: Constitutional provision drafted during Emergency period remains unchanged

cards.big: UN Working Group on Arbitrary Detention reviewed 14 Malaysian cases since 2018
cards.sub: Group found arbitrary detention in 11 of 14 cases examined

cards.big: Combined total of approximately 2,800 people held under preventive detention in 2025
cards.sub: Families and communities bear hidden costs of lost breadwinners and social stigma

cards.big: 7 laws enabling detention without trial is a system designed for control, not security
Suaram documented all 7 preventive detention regimes in 2024 annual report
